visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, a green newsboy cap, and a black 'HUMAN MADE' t-shirt stands indoors against a bright background of white curtains. He holds a large black tote bag with white 'WWDC' and '25' lettering printed in a large, stylized font. His facial expression is cheerful as he looks directly at the camera. He begins to manipulate the bag with his hands to show the texture and print quality. (2) A close-up shot focuses on a small, vibrant pink tag attached to the side of the black tote bag. The tag features the white Apple logo followed by the text 'WWDC25'. The man's fingers are seen gently pulling the fabric to ensure the tag is clearly visible and centered in the frame. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the contrast between the pink tag and black fabric. (3) The man reaches inside the tote bag and pulls out a sleek, matte black water bottle. The bottle has a bright pink carrying handle and the text 'WWDC25' printed vertically in white. He places the bottle on a reflective, mirror-like table surface in front of him. The reflection of the room and the bottle is visible on the tabletop. He uses both hands to position the bottle securely. (4) He reaches back into the bag and retrieves a long, flat pink lanyard or strap. The strap is decorated with black 'WWDC' lettering repeated across its length. He holds it up horizontally with both hands, stretching it out close to the camera lens so that the pattern and fabric texture are clearly discernible. He moves it slightly from side to side to show the full length. (5) The man pulls out a small black cardboard box and opens it to reveal a set of five enamel pins. He uses his index finger to point at each pin individually as he describes them. The pins include a colorful rainbow swirl, a purple octopus on a keyboard, a cursive 'hello' in gradient colors, a pink flower with 'California' text, and a square pin with a silver 'M' logo. (6) In the final phase, the man sits back on a light gray sofa with his arms crossed, smiling at the camera. He points a finger toward the viewer as he delivers his closing remarks. On the reflective table in front of him, the black water bottle, the open pin box, and the pink lanyard are neatly displayed. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and celebratory.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來，各位，我們現在已經拿到了WWDC，今年的2025紀念品喔，你看這個袋子，這袋子是我覺得贏了去年跟前年. (2) [Subtitle]: 很漂亮，而且這邊還有喜歡的粉紅色，有沒有看到？ (3) [Subtitle]: 趕快看一下，裡面有什麼東西，包含第一個啦，欸. (4) [Subtitle]: 每年的人水壺，有沒有？WWDC25，一樣有粉紅色. (5) [Subtitle]: 嘿，這個也是粉紅色的欸，你看. (6) [Subtitle]: 喔，這裡掛包包上. (7) [Subtitle]: 重點是，嘿嘿，就是它啦，每年PIN呢？都有一新的一些含意在裡面，我們大家來看有什麼？ (8) [Subtitle]: 好，包含第一個，Apple intelligence，有沒有？ (9) [Subtitle]: 然後呢，欸，這個hello都是常看到，對不對？ (10) [Subtitle]: 這個是加州的州花. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後這個Metal是一個API，是遊戲一個API，這個呢，是一個美國的俚語呢，就是. (12) [Subtitle]: 章魚在鍵盤上打字，意思是打字很快的意思，期待嗎？ (13) [Subtitle]: WWDC25，持續鎖定我們頻道.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting tech gifts
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a green newsboy cap, and a black t-shirt with 'HUMAN MADE' and a heart logo. He has several beaded bracelets on both wrists and a colorful Apple Watch strap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright indoor room with light gray walls, large white curtains, and a light-colored sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking with a friendly, energetic tone and moderate pitch. The speech rate is brisk but clear. A soft background music track featuring an acoustic guitar starts playing immediately. The voice exhibits a rising intonation at the end of sentences, suggesting excitement. Faint rustling noises of fabric are heard as the speaker handles a bag. (2) As the speaker continues, his voice remains at a consistent conversational volume with high articulation clarity. The background music maintains a steady, gentle rhythm. There is an audible sound of an object being placed on a hard surface—a soft thud. The incidental rustling of the bag becomes more frequent but remains secondary to the clear vocal track. (3) A distinct mechanical clicking sound occurs when a small box is opened. The speaker's voice shifts to a more descriptive and explanatory tone as he points out specific items. The pitch variability increases slightly to emphasize different points. The BGM continues without interruption, providing a warm, melodic foundation for the narration. (4) The speaker's arousal level remains high as he concludes his presentation. His voice is assertive and confident. He finishes with a direct address to the audience, maintaining a positive valence. The background music begins to fade out slightly as the video ends, with no technical distortions or clipping present in the final mix.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item 1 -> Item 2 -> Item 3 -> Item 4 -> Summary/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and unbox the commemorative gifts from Apple's WWDC 2025 event, expressing personal excitement about the design and specific items included, likely for a tech-enthusiast audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A clear, well-lit unboxing video of WWDC 2025 swag, featuring an enthusiastic presenter and high-quality production.
